calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-25-2024 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-30-2024 Continued To Feb-03-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Betterhelp Online Therapy To Comply With A Valid Subpoena Served On It For Records Pertaining To Plaintiff Venitha Gopi
Off Calendar May-20-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT NM-JASPER LLC, Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Betterhelp Online Therapy To Comply With A Valid Subpoena Served On It For Records Pertaining To Plaintiff Venitha Gopi

In this wrongful eviction action, the plaintiffs allege a number of claims against their landlord arising out of alleged uninhabitable dwellings and causes of action for both actual and constructive eviction. These allegations are intertwined with the alleged destruction of their dwelling units by a 2022 bomb explosion on the premises. Plaintiffs seek awards of damages, including personal injuries suffered as a result of the explosion and, generally, the inhabitability of the premises both before and after the bomb went off. As part of its discovery efforts, defendant's counsel subpoenaed the medical records of one of the plaintiffs from an online health therapy provider. Purportedly, the plaintiff had been treated on a number of occasions for PTSD symptoms. Despite the efforts of defendant's subpoena service, and its counsel, no response was received from the health care provider. No objections to the subpoena have been received nor, when the defendant filed a motion to obtain an order mandating the production of the subpoenaed records, did the health care provider respond to the motion.

For that reason, and for good cause shown, defendant's motion for an order compelling the health provider to produce the subpoenaed records is GRANTED. Counsel for defendant is directed to prepare a proposed order consistent herewith and email it to psw@hassard.com for review and execution.

Judge Pro Tem: Phillip Ward; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL BETTERHELP ONLINE THERAPY TO COMPLY WITH A VALID SUBPOENA SERVED ON IT FOR RECORDS PERTAINING TO PLAINTIFF VENITHA GOPI (ADDED FOR POSTING OF TENTATIVE RULING)

Off Calendar Aug-02-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Paul Collins, Esq. for Plaintiff, Kamylla Soares, via Courtcall.
